STAMINA.intent: Directly anchors the Base Health pool.

SPEED.intent: Movement speed and animation frame throughput.

CRAFT.intent: Efficiency in item assembly and repair.

MAGICCAPACITY.intent: Resource pool for casting abilities. 1 point = 100 mana (MaxMana = MAGICCAPACITY * 100). See Combat/ManaEconomy.yaml for regen rules and Combat/ManaflowSystem.yaml for the caster mana-recovery skill contract.

MAG.intent: Scaling for Shields, Barriers, and offensive magic output.

MED.intent: Scaling for raw Healing output and medicinal items.

DEXTERITY.intent: Controls critical damage and is the damage modifier for ranged physical attacks.

NTU.intent: Intuition. Governs how many scripted 'correct response' prompts get surfaced to the player during Mercenary Rank 2+ encounters -- a deliberate middle ground between a purely manual reaction and auto-battle: the game highlights the right button, the player still has to press it. See Combat/IntuitionPrompts.yaml.
